category.scope_note: Power tool comparison: China domestic compliance versus Saudi Arabia SASO / SABER market-access requirements.

title.en: China-to-Saudi Arabia Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入沙特阿拉伯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入沙特阿拉伯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Saudi Arabia SASO technical regulations, mandatory SABER Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC), IEC 62841 electrical-safety adoption, IECEE evidence, EMC controls, and market-entry labeling and battery considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与沙特阿拉伯 SASO 技术法规、SABER 产品符合性证书（PCoC）与货物符合性证书（SCoC）、SASO采用IEC 62841电气安全、IECEE证据、EMC与标签/电池问题差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與沙特阿拉伯 SASO 技術法規、SABER 產品符合性證書（PCoC）與貨物符合性證書（SCoC）、SASO採用IEC 62841電氣安全、IECEE證據、以及標籤與電池項目差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, market-access ruling, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current SASO technical regulations, SABER procedures, product labels, and safety documentation with qualified professionals before shipment or sale in Saudi Arabia.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、市场准入裁定或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货或进入沙特销售前应与合格专业人士核验现行SASO技术法规、SABER流程、标签与安全文件要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、市场准入裁定或產品安全設計評審。出口商與進口商在出貨或進入沙特銷售前應與合格專業人士核驗現行SASO技術法規、SABER流程、標籤與安全文件要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made power tools entering Saudi Arabia, the key practical gap is that Chinese CCC or GB/T evidence is not enough by itself. Saudi importers in-country usually need SABER registration, model-level conformity work for SASO technical regulations such as electrical safety and EMC, and a complete PCoC plus per-shipment SCoC flow with 230/400V 60Hz supply considerations before customs release at major ports such as Jeddah and Dammam.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动工具进入沙特的关键差距在于，仅凭中国的CCC或GB/T证据不足以直接满足要求。沙特境内进口商通常须完成SABER注册，按SASO技术法规对电气安全和EMC开展型号级合规工作，并在主要如吉达和达曼等港口清关前完成PCoC及每批SCoC，同时考虑230/400V 60Hz供电条件。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動工具進入沙特的關鍵差距在於，僅憑中國的CCC或GB/T證據不足以直接滿足要求。沙特境內進口商通常須完成SABER註冊，按SASO技術法規對電氣安全和EMC開展型號級合規工作，並在吉達、達曼等主要港口清關前完成PCoC及每批SCoC流程，同時考慮230/400V 60Hz供電條件。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Use only official regulator, standards body, customs, and platform sources. Keep rows factually scoped to verified Saudi and China requirements.
